hero.title: Strategic Advisory for Public Sector Modernization.
hero.subtitle: Applied Policy Systems LLC ensures that complex government administrative systems achieve absolute statutory fidelity through Independent Verification & Validation (IV&V) and Subject Matter Expert (SME) guidance.

challenge.label: The Implementation Gap
challenge.title: Policy is written in statutes. Systems are built in code. We translate between the two.
challenge.text: Public technology often fails when legislative mandates are lost in translation during software engineering. We bridge this gap by converting complex regulations into deterministic logic and actionable digital infrastructure.
challenge.solution: We ensure that the 'Rules of the System' are a perfect reflection of the 'Rules of the Law'.

infrastructure.label: System Integrity
infrastructure.title: High-Fidelity Architecture.
infrastructure.text: We architect secure frameworks for government agencies to deliver complex services with precision, protecting both the agency budget and the citizen experience.

sandbox.label: Document Intelligence
sandbox.title: Designing for Administrative Clarity
sandbox.text: Modernization is only successful if it works for both the agency and the citizen. Our Document Intelligence demonstrator illustrates this balance—providing residents with immediate feedback on their requirements while ensuring the administration receives data that is 100% compliant with statutory mandates.

manual.label: Methodology
manual.title: Human-Centered Policy Access
manual.text: Policy is only as effective as its accessibility. Our Living Policy Manual demonstrator showcases the 'Rules as Code' methodology—transforming dense legislative text into an intuitive, conversational guide that empowers citizens while providing administrators with a mathematically provable source of truth.

platform.title: Our Services
platform.desc: Deep-dive IV&V and SME advisory for health and human services modernization.

company.title: The Company
company.desc: Our mission, leadership, and empirical research into administrative outcomes.

contact.title: Consultation
contact.desc: Schedule a formal architectural review or statutory mapping workshop.

hero.label: Consultation
hero.title: Start the conversation.
hero.subtitle: Whether you're a government agency looking to modernize or a technology vendor seeking policy alignment, our architectural experts are ready to consult.

ai.title: Consult with our AI Assistant
ai.desc: Our specialized consulting assistant can help triage your needs and provide immediate architectural insights.

cta.title: Ready for a deep dive?
cta.desc: Our team is available for formal architectural reviews, statutory mapping workshops, and modernization strategy sessions.

founder.title: Graham O'Neill, Founder & Principal Consultant
founder.intro: Graham O’Neill is a public sector innovator with over 15 years of experience optimizing complex government systems.
founder.p1: His career is defined by successfully translating legislative mandates into compliant digital infrastructure. From municipal revenue operations to federal advisory roles, Graham has consistently focused on making policy work for the people it is intended to serve by aligning written regulations with operational realities.
founder.p2: Before founding Applied Policy Systems LLC, Graham held senior leadership positions across all levels of government, specializing in the structural evaluation of benefits access and the modernization of tax administration programs.

research.label: Research & Insights
research.title: Insights to improve service delivery and policy fidelity.

expertise.label: Strategic Advisory
expertise.title: Bridging the gap between policy and code.

science.title: Subject Matter Expert (SME) Advisory
science.desc: Our policy experts bridge the gap between legislative intent and operational reality. We provide the deep domain knowledge required to optimize complex government workflows and ensure intended policy outcomes.

compliance.title: Compliance & Risk Diagnostics
compliance.desc: Deep-dive audits of state-level payment error rates (SNAP/Medicaid). We identify systemic vulnerabilities and conceptualize real-time intervention mechanisms to mitigate risks before they trigger federal sanctions.

data.title: Interagency Data Strategy
data.desc: Architecting secure data-sharing frameworks between tax and human services. We specialize in cross-referencing non-filer data to maximize benefit uptake without compromising PII or system integrity.

fidelity.title: Independent Verification & Validation (IV&V)
fidelity.desc: We provide independent third-party verification of system logic. Using a 'Rules-as-Code' methodology, we audit architectures to ensure absolute statutory compliance and operational fidelity.

agencies.title: State & Municipal Agencies
agencies.desc: Protecting agency budgets from federal audit penalties through executive policy formulation and rigorous modernization strategy.

vendors.title: GovTech Vendors
vendors.desc: Supplying the exact logical parameters and 'Rules-as-Code' blueprints required to build compliant, auditable public sector software.

coalitions.title: Community Coalitions
coalitions.desc: Designing service delivery models that eliminate documentation barriers and renewal churn for vulnerable populations.
